name: Dream of Medicine
acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Investigation Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Lose 8 Black Sigils after the battle ends. At the start of the battle, shuffle a Basic Copy of each of the wielder's Basic Command Cards (except for Strike and Defense) into the Draw Pile.

lore: A thousand years ago, five minutes was equivalent to forty ounces of fine sand.
